name: Product Design
description: Turn early product ideas, live URLs, and static screenshots into prototypes teams can review. Research user friction, audit product flows, ideate visual directions, prototype from a URL or image, run design QA, and share a runnable prototype.

tools.name: product_design_guide
tools.description: Explain what the Product Design plugin does and how to use its workflows (research, audit, ideate, prototype, url-to-code, image-to-code, design-qa, share, user-context). Call this to orient before starting a Product Design task.

defaultPrompt: Help me get started with Product Design
Turn this product idea into three visual directions
Clone this URL into an editable prototype
Audit this onboarding flow for UX and accessibility issues
